options.name: -bump_connect_target
options.description: Checks only if routing matches connection specified by bump_connect_target properties (io:pin:port) regardless the class of the port.

options.name: -bumps
options.description: The name of bumps that will be checked

options.name: -class_bump
options.description: Checks only if ports of CLASS BUMP are routed to the bumps regardless the bump_connect_target properties.

options.name: -error
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of errors to report

options.name: -nets
options.description: The name of nets that will be checked

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the report file for verifyIO2BumpConnectivity violations data

options.name: -subclass
options.description: The name of subclasses of which the wires and vias will be checked

options.name: -warning
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of warnings to report
